svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="heddle-docs"> <diagram name="architecture-overview" id="arch-overview"> <mxGraphModel dx="-524" dy="-145" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="700" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Heddle Architecture Overview" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="300" x="350" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nats" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;" value="NATS Message Bus" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="800" x="100" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pipeline-group" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=25;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;rounded=1;" value="Pipeline Definition" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="250" x="100" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="yaml" parent="pipeline-group" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="YAML Config" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="20" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="orchestrator" parent="pipeline-group" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="Orchestrator" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="130" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="checkpoints" parent="pipeline-group" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="Checkpoints" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="20" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="model-tiers" parent="pipeline-group" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="Model Tiers
Local / Std / Frontier" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="130" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="silos" parent="pipeline-group" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="Knowledge Silos" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="75" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="worker-group" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=25;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;rounded=1;" value="Workers (Actors)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="250" x="400" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="worker-base" parent="worker-group" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="BaseWorker" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="75" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="worker-prompt" parent="worker-group" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Prompt Templates" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="20" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="worker-llm" parent="worker-group" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="LLM Backends
Anthropic / Ollama" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="130" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="worker-council" parent="worker-group" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Council Workers" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="75" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="iface-group" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=25;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;rounded=1;" value="Interfaces" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="200" x="700" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mcp" parent="iface-group" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="MCP Gateway" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="50" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="workshop" parent="iface-group" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Workshop (Web UI)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="50" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cli" parent="iface-group" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="CLI" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="50" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="contrib-group" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=25;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;rounded=1;" value="Contrib Modules" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="800" x="100" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c-chatbridge" parent="contrib-group" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="chatbridge" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="85" x="10" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c-council" parent="contrib-group" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="council" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="85" x="105" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c-docproc" parent="contrib-group" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="docproc" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="85" x="200" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c-duckdb" parent="contrib-group" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="duckdb" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="85" x="295" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c-lancedb" parent="contrib-group" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="lancedb" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="85" x="390" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c-rag" parent="contrib-group" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="rag" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="85" x="485" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c-redis" parent="contrib-group" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="redis" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="85" x="580" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c-subprocess" parent="contrib-group" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="subprocess" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="110" x="675" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-pipe-nats" edge="1" parent="1" source="pipeline-group" style="endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;entryX=0.2;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="nats"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-worker-nats" edge="1" parent="1" source="worker-group" style="endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="nats"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-iface-nats" edge="1" parent="1" source="iface-group" style="endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;entryX=0.8;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="nats"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-nats-contrib" edge="1" parent="1" source="nats" style="endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="contrib-group"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
